description: Style NoteIf you're looking for a way to enhance your sneaker-wear to a more classic, old-school appeal, this puma shoe is a great way to make a start!Product DetailsBlack mid-top shoe with central lace-ups, overlays and reinforced overlay at the heel counterPadded tongue and innerA strap fastened by a velcro closure on the mouthThick rubber midsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves
